pom.xml.general_idea: Update Spring Boot parent version to 4.0.5 to align with the Java 21 migration and Spring 4 framework requirements.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x is incompatible with Java 21 and Spring Framework 6.x; the project requires Spring Boot 3.x/4.x to compile and run on the target JDK.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version property from 1.8 to 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Maven compiler plugin will fail to compile code using Java 21 features (like records, sealed classes, or switch expressions) if the source level is set to 1.8.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated Springfox Swagger dependencies with SpringDoc OpenAPI starter.
pom.xml.why_exists: Springfox 2.x is incompatible with Spring Boot 3.x/4.x and Spring MVC 6.x due to changes in the servlet API and Spring MVC internals; it will fail to start or compile.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Apache POI library versions to 5.4.1 to support Java 21 and modern file formats.
pom.xml.why_exists: Apache POI 3.10-FINAL is incompatible with Java 21 (uses removed internal APIs) and lacks support for modern Office formats required by the application.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update iText library version to 4.2.2 to ensure compatibility with the new build environment.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older iText versions may have dependencies or bytecode incompatibilities with Java 21 or newer Spring Boot starters.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Lombok version to 1.18.38 to support Java 21 language features.
pom.xml.why_exists: Lombok 1.18.4 does not support Java 21 syntax (e.g., records, pattern matching) and will cause compilation errors or annotation processing failures.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Switch the active database configuration from PostgreSQL to H2 in-memory/file storage.
src/main/resources/application.propertie.why_exists: The application will fail to start or connect to the database if the driver and URL do not match the available database service; this change aligns the config with the H2 dependency likely added for the migration.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Update the Hibernate dialect to match the new H2 database engine.
src/main/resources/application.propertie.why_exists: Using the PostgreSQL dialect with an H2 database causes runtime SQL generation errors or startup failures due to incompatible SQL syntax.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Enable Spring MVC multipart file uploads which were previously disabled.
src/main/resources/application.propertie.why_exists: File upload endpoints will return 400 Bad Request or fail to parse multipart requests if this property is false.
